38. If Rahu is in the 7 , or the 12 from Lagn Pad, or gives a Drishti to one
of the said Bhavas, the native will be endowed with spiritual knowledge and
be very fortunate.
39. If Budh is in Lagn Pad, the native will Lord over a whole country, while
Guru will make him a knower of all things. Śukr in this context denotes a
poet/speaker (also see Ch. 29, verse 30).
nd
40. O excellent of the Brahmins, if benefics occupy the 2 from Upa Pad,
or from Lagn Pad, the native will be endowed with all kinds of wealth and
be intelligent.
nd
41. One will surely become a thief, if the Lord of the 2 from Upa Pad is in
Dhan Bhava and is there yuti with a malefic Grah.
nd th
42-43. O Brahmin, if Rahu is in the 2 from the Lord of the 7 , counted
nd
from Upa Pad, the native will have long and projected teeth. Ketu in the 2
